---
title: ""
page-layout: full
about:
  template: solana
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophiasufei-chen-389591233
    - icon: envelope
      text: DCU Email
      href: mailto:chen.sophiasufei2@mail.dcu.ie
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/sooofeiii?igsh=cXkwYWNnMG9iNHU4&utm_source=qr
---

## Sophia Sufei Chen

Aspiring Business Analyst & Marketing Planner | Final Year Business Studies Student at DCU | Accounting Assistant Intern | ACCA Student | Chinese & English

I am a final year Business Studies student at Dublin City University, specialising in Business Analytics and Marketing Planning. I am currently working as an Accounting Assistant Intern at PTB Accounting LTD, where I am gaining practical experience in accounting support, financial documentation, and day-to-day business operations.

In addition to my academic studies, I am also pursuing ACCA, which is helping me strengthen my knowledge of accounting, finance, and professional practice. My education and internship experience have helped me build a solid foundation in business analysis, commercial awareness, and problem-solving.

I am interested in opportunities in business analysis, marketing, finance support, and graduate roles where I can continue learning, contribute effectively, and grow in a professional environment.

::: {.hero-buttons}
[View Portfolio](projects/index.qmd){.primary-btn}
[Download CV](cv.pdf){.secondary-btn target="_blank"}
[More About Me](about_more.qmd){.secondary-btn}
:::

## Background {#background}

::: {.background-grid}
::: {.background-image}
![](images/background.jpg){.feature-image}
:::

::: {.background-text}
### Academic and Professional Development

My background combines university study with practical experience in customer service, retail operations, and accounting support. These experiences have helped me develop strong communication, teamwork, organisation, and problem-solving skills in professional environments.

Through my studies, I have also developed growing confidence in business systems, analytics tools, and data-driven decision-making. I am especially interested in how businesses can improve performance through better use of information, digital tools, and customer understanding.
:::
:::

## Core Skills {#skills}

::: {.skills-grid}
::: {.skill-card}
### Analytics Tools
Excel  
SQL  
Python  
Jamovi
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Business Tools
PowerPoint  
Word  
Xero  
Power BI
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Professional Skills
Communication  
Teamwork  
Time Management  
Problem-Solving
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Accounting & Finance
Accounting Support  
Financial Documentation  
ACCA Learning  
Commercial Awareness
:::
:::

## Certs {#certs}

::: {.certs-intro}
I am committed to continuous online learning and professional self-development. Through the Kubicle platform, I have been strengthening my practical skills in business software and digital tools. These certificates reflect my willingness to keep improving my self skills, technical confidence, and workplace readiness beyond the classroom.
:::

::: {.certs-grid}
::: {.cert-card}
<img src="images/Kubicle-Diploma-Excel.jpg" alt="Kubicle Diploma Excel" class="cert-thumb lightbox-trigger">

### Kubicle Diploma — Excel

This certificate reflects my continued development in Excel and my interest in improving practical spreadsheet, reporting, and business analysis skills through independent online learning.
:::

::: {.cert-card}
<img src="images/Kubicle-Diploma-Word.jpg" alt="Kubicle Diploma Word" class="cert-thumb lightbox-trigger">

### Kubicle Diploma — Word

This certificate supports my professional development in document preparation, communication, and workplace presentation, showing my commitment to building useful office and business support skills.
:::

::: {.cert-card}
<img src="images/Kubicle-Diploma-SQL.jpg" alt="Kubicle Diploma SQL" class="cert-thumb lightbox-trigger">

### Kubicle Diploma — SQL

This certificate demonstrates my effort to strengthen database and query skills through structured online learning, supporting my longer-term development in analytics and data-focused work.
:::
:::

<div id="imageLightbox" class="image-lightbox">
  <button class="lightbox-close" aria-label="Close">×</button>
  <img id="lightboxImage" class="lightbox-image" src="" alt="Expanded certificate preview">
</div>

## Portfolio {#projects}

::: {.portfolio-grid}
::: {.portfolio-text}
### Selected Portfolio Work

This portfolio highlights three main projects that reflect different dimensions of my academic and professional development: marketing analysis, business intelligence, and quantitative risk analysis. Together, they show how I combine structured thinking, analytical tools, and professional presentation.

The projects demonstrate my experience with Excel, SQL-informed logic, Power BI dashboard storytelling, and quantitative analysis using financial and business data.

[Open Portfolio](projects/index.qmd){.primary-btn .small-btn}
[Read Reflection](reflection.qmd){.secondary-btn .small-btn}
:::

::: {.portfolio-image}
![](images/project.jpg){.feature-image}
:::
:::

## Media {#media}

::: {.media-intro}
A curated selection of video resources that support my learning in business analytics, ACCA, and professional English development.[^media]
:::

::: {.media-grid}
::: {.media-card}
<div class="video-wrap">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/9fFQA-JOXA0" title="What Is Business Analytics?" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### Business Analytics

This video gives a clear introduction to business analytics and helps explain how data can support better business decisions.
:::

::: {.media-card}
<div class="video-wrap">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Dm8AEZECc5E" title="What Is ACCA?" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### ACCA Learning

This resource supports my understanding of the ACCA pathway, its global value, and the professional opportunities it creates in finance and accounting.
:::

::: {.media-card}
<div class="video-wrap">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/5ZQ65RbsAB8" title="English Learning" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

### English Learning

This English learning video helps me strengthen listening, vocabulary, and communication skills, which are important for study and professional growth.
:::
:::

[^media]: These videos are included as learning resources to support my independent professional development outside the classroom.

::: {.custom-footer #contact}
::: {.footer-grid}
::: {.footer-block}
#### Contact

Dublin, Ireland

[chen.sophiasufei2@mail.dcu.ie](mailto:chen.sophiasufei2@mail.dcu.ie)
:::

::: {.footer-block .footer-center}
#### Connect

<div class="social-icons">
  <a href="mailto:chen.sophiasufei2@mail.dcu.ie" class="social-link" aria-label="DCU Email" title="DCU Email">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true" class="social-svg">
      <path d="M3 5h18v14H3V5zm2 2v.5l7 5 7-5V7H5zm14 10V9.3l-7 5-7-5V17h14z" fill="currentColor"/>
    </svg>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophiasufei-chen-389591233" target="_blank" class="social-link" aria-label="LinkedIn" title="LinkedIn">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true" class="social-svg">
      <path d="M6.94 8.5a1.56 1.56 0 1 1 0-3.12 1.56 1.56 0 0 1 0 3.12zM5.5 10h2.88v8.5H5.5V10zm4.68 0h2.76v1.16h.04c.38-.73 1.32-1.5 2.72-1.5 2.9 0 3.44 1.9 3.44 4.36v4.48h-2.88v-3.97c0-.95-.02-2.17-1.32-2.17-1.32 0-1.52 1.03-1.52 2.1v4.04h-2.88V10z" fill="currentColor"/>
    </svg>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.instagram.com/sooofeiii?igsh=cXkwYWNnMG9iNHU4&utm_source=qr" target="_blank" class="social-link" aria-label="Instagram" title="Instagram">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true" class="social-svg">
      <path d="M7.5 3h9A4.5 4.5 0 0 1 21 7.5v9a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-4.5 4.5h-9A4.5 4.5 0 0 1 3 16.5v-9A4.5 4.5 0 0 1 7.5 3zm0 1.8A2.7 2.7 0 0 0 4.8 7.5v9a2.7 2.7 0 0 0 2.7 2.7h9a2.7 2.7 0 0 0 2.7-2.7v-9a2.7 2.7 0 0 0-2.7-2.7h-9zm9.45 1.35a1.05 1.05 0 1 1 0 2.1 1.05 1.05 0 0 1 0-2.1zM12 7.5A4.5 4.5 0 1 1 7.5 12 4.5 4.5 0 0 1 12 7.5zm0 1.8A2.7 2.7 0 1 0 14.7 12 2.7 2.7 0 0 0 12 9.3z" fill="currentColor"/>
    </svg>
  </a>
</div>
:::

::: {.footer-block .footer-right}
#### Portfolio

Designed by Sophia Sufei Chen | 2026  
Built with Quarto
:::
:::
:::
